header.title: CovidCharts
header.disclaimer: Data: Johns Hopkins CSSE via covid-api.com — through Mar 2023

banner.hint: Select a country to view charts

instructions.title: Quick Start
instructions.step1: Select a country from the dropdown above
instructions.step2: If the country has states/provinces, select one
instructions.step3: If the country has cities, select a city
instructions.flattenExamples: Germany, South Korea, United States (NY, NY)
instructions.tip: Use the time-range buttons (1M / 3M…) to change historical period

projections.noData: Not enough data to compute forecast (need ≥ {{n}} data points)
